properties.displayName: Enforce Azure Kubernetes Services (AKS) Kubernetes Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) (Kubernetes-Native Authorization)
properties.description: Audits or denies Azure Kubernetes Services (AKS) clusters that do not have Kubernetes Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) enabled. This policy enforces Kubernetes-native authorization based on Kubernetes Role and RoleBinding objects for users, groups, and service accounts. It is a prerequisite control and is distinct from Azure RBAC for Kubernetes authorization.

metadata.changeReason: Standardized metadata for governance traceability and consistent policy review context.
metadata.complianceIntent: Enforce or audit this specific AKS security control according to the assignment effect parameter.

metadata.description: Sets whether this policy audits, denies, or is disabled for Azure Kubernetes Services (AKS) clusters that do not enable Kubernetes-native RBAC authorization.
